coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 70% for 11:42. Easy miles make fast racing. Stop overthinking.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: 60-70% FTP. Fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Easy miles = fast racing. 70% for 11:42. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 33 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 33 minutes to go. Easy does it. 70% FTP. Build your engine.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 26% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 17:33 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 17:33 at 75%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 26% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 65% complete. Block 1/1. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 29min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 85-100 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65% complete. Block 1/1. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65% done. This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: 65% complete. 100% for 1:21. Don't let power spike. Stay smooth.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/1. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 1 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1/1. 68% complete. Hold 100% steady. 13 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 68% through. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness. Stay strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 30 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1: 1:21 at 100%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 1 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 1:21 at 100%. Then 11min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 100-100% FTP, 85-100 rpm. After this: 11min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 11min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 1:21 at 100%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 100% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 74% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 33min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 74% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 74% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 74% into session. 60%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
